description: This is an HTML source file defining the layout, styling, and client-side script for a web-based database visualizer interface. It includes UI elements for selecting databases and tables, displaying data in tabular format, and handling user interactions such as refreshing, expanding data cells, and error handling.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches and displays the list of available databases.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list by triggering loadDatabases and resetting UI states.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Toggles visibility of tables for a selected database and loads the tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables within a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and renders data rows for the selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Generates HTML for displaying a data table based on fetched data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates HTML for individual table cell contents, handling special content like objects and long text.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Handles expanding and collapsing long or object cell contents to show full data.
